mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% indicates tightening labor markets, which drives corporate profit growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE remains below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in housing starts above 1.4 million units signals increased consumer confidence and demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where HOUST remains above 1400.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in industrial production and GDP indicates strong supply-side momentum, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO/GDPC1 and SPX returns falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading below 2.0% indicates disinflationary pressures, which reduces real interest rates and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL remains below 2.0.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate above 5.25% signals a tightening cycle that increases borrowing costs, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS remains above 5.25.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production indicates robust manufacturing activity, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO remains above its 3-month moving average.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in retail sales above $370 billion signals strong consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where RSAFS remains above 370000.
